title: Map with bigint keys
description: Root `Map<bigint, number>` keyed by bigint with number values. JSON serializes to an array of `[key, value]` pairs and restores via `new Map(v)`; each bigint key is emitted as a decimal string (not natively JSON-encodable) and rebuilt with `BigInt(...)`, while number values pass through atomically. Binary writes a size-prefixed entry list, encoding bigint keys natively.
notes: Map round-trips as a JSON array of [key, value] pairs, rehydrated to a Map on decode.
bigint keys serialize as decimal strings and restore via BigInt(...); JSON cannot encode bigint directly.
